title: jasminum sessile
intro: Jasminum sessile, also known as the drooping jasmine or star jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Guinea. It is valued for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antifungal and antiviral properties. The leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
